items.title: Kumanjayi Little Baby's family says 'now is not the time' to 'make trouble' in Alice Springs

children.content: The family of Alice Springs five-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby have called for calm following rioting in the outback town overnight, while police say her alleged murderer was beaten unconscious.

articles.title: Alice Springs erupts in violence after 5yo girl's alleged killer arrested

children.content: Wild scenes erupted on the streets of Alice Springs last night following the arrest of Jefferson Lewis over the alleged murder of five-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby.

image.altText: A person picking up a smoke canister on the street at night with crowds in the background.

items.title: Ex-premier's partner charged with rape and deprivation of liberty

children.content: Vahid Reza Adib, the partner of former Queensland premier Annastacia Palaszczuk, has been charged with three counts of rape relating to alleged offending against a woman in her 30s at Burleigh Heads on March 30.

image.altText: A balding man of about 60 in a suit slightly smiles as he walks past reporters' microphones on a suburban street

items.title: 'No secrets': Alternative school's history of discipline in spotlight

children.content: For 50 years, this alternative school sold parents a vision of progressive education. But some who have passed through its doors say a 'cult-like' culture enabled decades of unchecked physical abuse.

image.altText: Faye Berryman and Philip O'Carroll in a sepia toned photo with deidentified children.

items.title: A deadline for Trump to end the Iran war is looming. He may seek to get around it

children.content: A deadline for US President Donald Trump to end the Iran war is about to expire. Here is what to expect.

articles.title: Commanders to brief Trump on fresh military options for Iran war — as it happened

children.content: Iran says it will respond with "long and painful strikes" on US positions if Washington renews attacks and reasserts its control over the Strait of Hormuz — as it happened.

image.altText: Donald Trump speaking with his hands out.

articles.title: PM says no determination made over latest US proposal to open Strait of Hormuz

children.content: Australia has begun discussions with the United States about joining the latest US proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the Trump administration tries to build an international coalition to restore freedom of navigation in the critical waterway.

image.altText: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese seated for an interview in front of Australian, Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander flags.

articles.title: 'Planning for a rainy day': How China is dealing with the global oil shock

children.content: China relies heavily on Middle Eastern oil imports, but experts say a double-insurance strategy appears to have helped the country absorb at least the initial shock after disruption to the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Australian 'ISIS brides' in limbo after reportedly being blocked from reaching Syrian airport

items.title: Hard-won legacy of Australia's longest strike in jeopardy

children.content: It's been 80 years since Aboriginal workers in the Pilbara up-ended a slave-like labour system. The descendants of those involved fear its legacy is being forgotten.
